arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Werder Bremen preview: Die Adler looking to continue winning run
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt will look to claim a fifth consecutive victory in all competitions when they welcome Werder Bremen to Deutsche Bank Park for Saturday’s Bundesliga contest.

arts.ttl: Five goalscorers to watch out for this weekend: Marmoush, Gakpo and Kean to maintain fine form
arts.sum: Tom McGarry has picked out five goalscorers to follow across Europe's big leagues this weekend.
Action from the German top flight returns after the international break and Alex Jack is on hand to provide score predictions for all nine Bundesliga games this weekend.

arts.ttl: Preview: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Werder Bremen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and Werder Bremen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
